Container.Name: VitaPlan
Container.Overview: Self-hosted daily vitamin and supplement planner. Add the bottles you own by barcode, Health Canada NPN, label photo (local OCR), or manual entry, build a weekly schedule, and see a spreadsheet of what every product adds to your day against NIH/Health Canada recommended amounts and safe upper limits. Multi-user with login; all data stays in this container.
Container.Description: Self-hosted daily vitamin and supplement planner with barcode/NPN/OCR product import, weekly schedules, and RDA/upper-limit tracking.

Config.Name: Auth Secret
Config.Description: Optional. Long random string used to sign login sessions (openssl rand -base64 32). Leave blank to auto-generate one stored in the Data folder.

Config.Name: Trusted Origins
Config.Description: Usually leave blank — the app trusts its own address automatically. Only set this (comma-separated) if you reach VitaPlan from a different origin than it is served on, e.g. https://vitaplan.example.com,http://192.168.1.50:3005

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true only when VitaPlan is served exclusively over HTTPS (e.g. behind a reverse proxy with a certificate).

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns the Data folder (99 = nobody, the unraid default).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns the Data folder (100 = users, the unraid default).

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: UMASK for newly created files. Do not change unless you know what you're doing.
